tEn: Soft Actor-Critic: Off-Policy Maximum Entropy Deep Reinforcement Learning with a Stochastic Actor
tZh: 软演员-评论家：基于随机演员的离策略最大熵深度强化学习
sEn: Soft Actor-Critic achieves state-of-the-art performance on continuous control tasks with high stability and sample efficiency.
sZh: 软演员-评论家算法在连续控制任务上实现了最先进的性能，具有高稳定性和样本效率。
absEn: Model-free deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been demonstrated on a range of challenging decision making and control tasks. However, these methods typically suffer from two major challenges: very high sample complexity and brittle convergence properties, which necessitate meticulous hyperparameter tuning. Both of these challenges severely limit the applicability of such methods to complex, real-world domains. In this paper, we propose soft actor-critic, an off-policy actor-critic deep RL algorithm based on the maximum entropy reinforcement learning framework. In this framework, the actor aims to maximize expected reward while also maximizing entropy. That is, to succeed at the task while acting as randomly as possible. Prior deep RL methods based on this framework have been formulated as Q-learning methods. By combining off-policy updates with a stable stochastic actor-critic formulation, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on a range of continuous control benchmark tasks, outperforming prior on-policy and off-policy methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate that, in contrast to other off-policy algorithms, our approach is very stable, achieving very similar performance across different random seeds.
absZh: 无模型深度强化学习算法已在多种具有挑战性的决策和控制任务中得到验证。然而，这些方法通常面临两大挑战：极高的样本复杂度和脆弱的收敛性，这需要细致的超参数调整。这两个挑战严重限制了此类方法在复杂现实领域中的应用。在本文中，我们提出了软演员-评论家算法，一种基于最大熵强化学习框架的离策略演员-评论家深度强化学习算法。在该框架中，演员旨在最大化期望奖励的同时最大化熵，即在尽可能随机行动的同时成功完成任务。先前基于该框架的深度强化学习方法被表述为Q学习方法。通过将离策略更新与稳定的随机演员-评论家公式相结合，我们的方法在一系列连续控制基准任务上实现了最先进的性能，优于先前的在策略和离策略方法。此外，我们证明，与其他离策略算法相比，我们的方法非常稳定，在不同随机种子下实现了非常相似的性能。

contrib.en: Proposes soft actor-critic (SAC), an off-policy maximum entropy deep RL algorithm.
contrib.zh: 提出软演员-评论家（SAC），一种基于最大熵的离策略深度强化学习算法。

contrib.en: Combines off-policy updates with a stable stochastic actor-critic formulation.
contrib.zh: 将离策略更新与稳定的随机演员-评论家公式相结合。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on continuous control benchmarks, outperforming prior on-policy and off-policy methods.
contrib.zh: 在连续控制基准上取得最先进性能，优于先前的在策略和离策略方法。

contrib.en: Demonstrates high stability across different random seeds, unlike other off-policy algorithms.
contrib.zh: 与其他离策略算法不同，展示了跨不同随机种子的高度稳定性。

contrib.en: Provides convergence proof for soft policy iteration in the maximum entropy framework.
contrib.zh: 在最大熵框架下提供了软策略迭代的收敛性证明。

contrib.en: Uses two Q-functions to mitigate positive bias and improve training speed.
contrib.zh: 使用两个Q函数来减轻正向偏差并提高训练速度。

limits.en: Sensitive to reward scaling, which controls the temperature and policy stochasticity.
limits.zh: 对奖励缩放敏感，该缩放控制温度和策略随机性。

limits.en: Requires tuning of reward scale as a key hyperparameter for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 需要调整奖励缩放作为关键超参数以获得最佳性能。

limits.en: Assumes continuous action spaces; applicability to discrete actions not directly addressed.
limits.zh: 假设连续动作空间；未直接解决离散动作的适用性。

limits.en: Performance may degrade with very small or very large reward magnitudes due to exploration-exploitation balance.
limits.zh: 由于探索-利用平衡，奖励幅度非常小或非常大时性能可能下降。

limits.en: Theoretical convergence proof assumes finite action space, limiting direct extension to continuous actions.
limits.zh: 理论收敛性证明假设有限动作空间，限制了直接扩展到连续动作。

items.en: Model-free deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been demonstrated on a range of challenging decision making and control tasks. However, these methods typically suffer from two major challenges: very high sample complexity and brittle convergence properties, which necessitate meticulous hyperparameter tuning. Both of these challenges severely limit the applicability of such methods to complex, real-world domains. In this paper, we propose soft actor-critic, an off-policy actor-critic deep RL algorithm based on the maximum entropy reinforcement learning framework. In this framework, the actor aims to maximize expected reward while also maximizing entropy. That is, to succeed at the task while acting as randomly as possible. Prior deep RL methods based on this framework have been formulated as Q-learning methods. By combining off-policy updates with a stable stochastic actor-critic formulation, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on a range of continuous control benchmark tasks, outperforming prior on-policy and off-policy methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate that, in contrast to other off-policy algorithms, our approach is very stable, achieving very similar performance across different random seeds.
items.zh: 无模型深度强化学习算法已在多种具有挑战性的决策和控制任务中得到验证。然而，这些方法通常面临两大难题：极高的样本复杂性和脆弱的收敛特性，这需要精细的超参数调优。这两个挑战严重限制了此类方法在复杂现实领域中的应用。在本文中，我们提出了软演员-评论家算法，这是一种基于最大熵强化学习框架的离策略演员-评论家深度强化学习算法。在该框架中，演员旨在最大化期望奖励的同时也最大化熵，即尽可能随机地行动以完成任务。先前基于该框架的深度强化学习方法被表述为Q学习方法。通过将离策略更新与稳定的随机演员-评论家公式相结合，我们的方法在一系列连续控制基准任务上实现了最先进的性能，优于先前的在策略和离策略方法。此外，我们证明，与其他离策略算法相比，我们的方法非常稳定，在不同随机种子下实现了非常相似的性能。

items.en: Model-free deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been applied in a range of challenging domains, from games (Mnih et al., 2013; Silver et al., 2016) to robotic control (Schulman et al., 2015). The combination of RL and high-capacity function approximators such as neural networks holds the promise of automating a wide range of decision making and control tasks, but widespread adoption of these methods in real-world domains has been hampered by two major challenges. First, model-free deep RL methods are notoriously expensive in terms of their sample complexity. Even relatively simple tasks can require millions of steps of data collection, and complex behaviors with high-dimensional observations might need substantially more. Second, these methods are often brittle with respect to their hyperparameters: learning rates, exploration constants, and other settings must be set carefully for different problem settings to achieve good results. Both of these challenges severely limit the applicability of model-free deep RL to real-world tasks.
items.zh: 无模型深度强化学习（RL）算法已应用于一系列具有挑战性的领域，从游戏（Mnih 等人，2013；Silver 等人，2016）到机器人控制（Schulman 等人，2015）。强化学习与神经网络等高容量函数逼近器的结合有望自动化广泛的决策和控制任务，但这些方法在现实世界领域的广泛采用受到两个主要挑战的阻碍。首先，无模型深度强化学习方法在样本复杂度方面出了名的昂贵。即使是相对简单的任务也可能需要数百万步的数据收集，而具有高维观测的复杂行为可能需要更多。其次，这些方法对其超参数通常很脆弱：学习率、探索常数和其他设置必须针对不同的问题设置仔细调整才能获得良好结果。这两个挑战严重限制了无模型深度强化学习在现实任务中的适用性。

items.en: One cause for the poor sample efficiency of deep RL methods is on-policy learning: some of the most commonly used deep RL algorithms, such as TRPO (Schulman et al., 2015), PPO (Schulman et al., 2017b) or A3C (Mnih et al., 2016), require new samples to be collected for each gradient step. This quickly becomes extravagantly expensive, as the number of gradient steps and samples per step needed to learn an effective policy increases with task complexity. Off-policy algorithms aim to reuse past experience. This is not directly feasible with conventional policy gradient formulations, but is relatively straightforward for Q-learning based methods (Mnih et al., 2015). Unfortunately, the combination of off-policy learning and high-dimensional, nonlinear function approximation with neural networks presents a major challenge for stability and convergence (Bhatnagar et al., 2009). This challenge is further exacerbated in continuous state and action spaces, where a separate actor network is often used to perform the maximization in Q-learning. A commonly used algorithm in such settings, deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) (Lillicrap et al., 2015), provides for sample-efficient learning but is notoriously challenging to use due to its extreme brittleness and hyperparameter sensitivity (Duan et al., 2016; Henderson et al., 2017).
items.zh: 深度强化学习方法样本效率低下的一个原因是同策略学习：一些最常用的深度强化学习算法，如 TRPO（Schulman 等人，2015）、PPO（Schulman 等人，2017b）或 A3C（Mnih 等人，2016），需要为每个梯度步骤收集新样本。这很快变得极其昂贵，因为学习有效策略所需的梯度步骤数和每步样本数随任务复杂度增加。异策略算法旨在重用过去的经验。这在传统的策略梯度公式中无法直接实现，但对于基于 Q 学习的方法（Mnih 等人，2015）相对直接。不幸的是，异策略学习与使用神经网络的高维非线性函数逼近相结合，给稳定性和收敛性带来了重大挑战（Bhatnagar 等人，2009）。在连续状态和动作空间中，这一挑战进一步加剧，因为通常使用单独的动作网络来执行 Q 学习中的最大化。在这种设置下常用的算法，深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）（Lillicrap 等人，2015），提供了样本高效的学习，但由于其极端的脆弱性和超参数敏感性而出了名的难以使用（Duan 等人，2016；Henderson 等人，2017）。

items.en: We explore how to design an efficient and stable model-free deep RL algorithm for continuous state and action spaces. To that end, we draw on the maximum entropy framework, which augments the standard maximum reward reinforcement learning objective with an entropy maximization term (Ziebart et al., 2008; Toussaint, 2009; Rawlik et al., 2012; Fox et al., 2016; Haarnoja et al., 2017). Maximum entropy reinforcement learning alters the RL objective, though the original objective can be recovered using a temperature parameter (Haarnoja et al., 2017). More importantly, the maximum entropy formulation provides a substantial improvement in exploration and robustness: as discussed by Ziebart (2010), maximum entropy policies are robust in the face of model and estimation errors, and as demonstrated by (Haarnoja et al., 2017), they improve exploration by acquiring diverse behaviors. Prior work has proposed model-free deep RL algorithms that perform on-policy learning with entropy maximization (O’Donoghue et al., 2016), as well as off-policy methods based on soft Q-learning and its variants (Schulman et al., 2017a; Nachum et al., 2017a; Haarnoja et al., 2017). However, the on-policy variants suffer from poor sample complexity for the reasons discussed above, while the off-policy variants require complex approximate inference procedures in continuous action spaces.
items.zh: 我们探索如何为连续状态和动作空间设计一个高效且稳定的无模型深度强化学习算法。为此，我们借鉴了最大熵框架，该框架通过一个熵最大化项增强了标准的最大奖励强化学习目标（Ziebart 等人，2008；Toussaint，2009；Rawlik 等人，2012；Fox 等人，2016；Haarnoja 等人，2017）。最大熵强化学习改变了强化学习目标，尽管原始目标可以通过温度参数恢复（Haarnoja 等人，2017）。更重要的是，最大熵公式在探索和鲁棒性方面提供了显著改进：如 Ziebart（2010）所讨论的，最大熵策略在面对模型和估计误差时具有鲁棒性，并且如 Haarnoja 等人（2017）所证明的，它们通过获取多样化的行为来改善探索。先前的工作提出了执行同策略学习与熵最大化的无模型深度强化学习算法（O'Donoghue 等人，2016），以及基于软 Q 学习及其变体的异策略方法（Schulman 等人，2017a；Nachum 等人，2017a；Haarnoja 等人，2017）。然而，同策略变体由于上述原因遭受样本复杂度差的困扰，而异策略变体在连续动作空间中需要复杂的近似推理过程。

items.en: In this paper, we demonstrate that we can devise an off-policy maximum entropy actor-critic algorithm, which we call soft actor-critic (SAC), which provides for both sample-efficient learning and stability. This algorithm extends readily to very complex, high-dimensional tasks, such as the Humanoid benchmark (Duan et al., 2016) with 21 action dimensions, where off-policy methods such as DDPG typically struggle to obtain good results (Gu et al., 2016). SAC also avoids the complexity and potential instability associated with approximate inference in prior off-policy maximum entropy algorithms based on soft Q-learning (Haarnoja et al., 2017). We present a convergence proof for policy iteration in the maximum entropy framework, and then introduce a new algorithm based on an approximation to this procedure that can be practically implemented with deep neural networks, which we call soft actor-critic. We present empirical results that show that soft actor-critic attains a substantial improvement in both performance and sample efficiency over both off-policy and on-policy prior methods. We also compare to twin delayed deep deterministic (TD3) policy gradient algorithm (Fujimoto et al., 2018), which is a concurrent work that proposes a deterministic algorithm that substantially improves on DDPG.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们证明我们可以设计一个异策略最大熵演员-评论家算法，我们称之为软演员-评论家（SAC），它同时提供了样本高效的学习和稳定性。该算法很容易扩展到非常复杂的高维任务，例如具有 21 个动作维度的 Humanoid 基准（Duan 等人，2016），其中异策略方法如 DDPG 通常难以获得良好结果（Gu 等人，2016）。SAC 还避免了先前基于软 Q 学习的异策略最大熵算法（Haarnoja 等人，2017）中与近似推理相关的复杂性和潜在不稳定性。我们给出了最大熵框架中策略迭代的收敛性证明，然后介绍了一个基于该过程近似的新算法，该算法可以用深度神经网络实际实现，我们称之为软演员-评论家。我们提供的实证结果表明，软演员-评论家在性能和样本效率上都比异策略和同策略的先前方法有显著改进。我们还将与双延迟深度确定性（TD3）策略梯度算法（Fujimoto 等人，2018）进行比较，这是一项并行工作，提出了一种显著改进 DDPG 的确定性算法。

items.en: Our soft actor-critic algorithm incorporates three key ingredients: an actor-critic architecture with separate policy and value function networks, an off-policy formulation that enables reuse of previously collected data for efficiency, and entropy maximization to enable stability and exploration. We review prior works that draw on some of these ideas in this section. Actor-critic algorithms are typically derived starting from policy iteration, which alternates between policy evaluation—computing the value function for a policy—and policy improvement—using the value function to obtain a better policy (Barto et al., 1983; Sutton & Barto, 1998). In large-scale reinforcement learning problems, it is typically impractical to run either of these steps to convergence, and instead the value function and policy are optimized jointly. In this case, the policy is referred to as the actor, and the value function as the critic. Many actor-critic algorithms build on the standard, on-policy policy gradient formulation to update the actor (Peters & Schaal, 2008), and many of them also consider the entropy of the policy, but instead of maximizing the entropy, they use it as an regularizer (Schulman et al., 2017b, 2015; Mnih et al., 2016; Gruslys et al., 2017). On-policy training tends to improve stability but results in poor sample complexity.
items.zh: 我们的软演员-评论家算法包含三个关键要素：一个具有独立策略和价值函数网络的演员-评论家架构，一种能够重用先前收集的数据以提高效率的离策略公式，以及用于实现稳定性和探索的熵最大化。在本节中，我们回顾了利用其中一些思想的先前工作。演员-评论家算法通常从策略迭代开始推导，该迭代交替进行策略评估（计算策略的价值函数）和策略改进（使用价值函数获得更好的策略）（Barto 等人，1983；Sutton & Barto，1998）。在大规模强化学习问题中，通常无法将这两个步骤中的任何一个运行到收敛，而是联合优化价值函数和策略。在这种情况下，策略被称为演员，价值函数被称为评论家。许多演员-评论家算法基于标准的、在策略的策略梯度公式来更新演员（Peters & Schaal，2008），并且其中许多算法也考虑了策略的熵，但不是最大化熵，而是将其用作正则化器（Schulman 等人，2017b，2015；Mnih 等人，2016；Gruslys 等人，2017）。在策略训练倾向于提高稳定性，但会导致较差的样本复杂度。

items.en: There have been efforts to increase the sample efficiency while retaining robustness by incorporating off-policy samples and by using higher order variance reduction techniques (O’Donoghue et al., 2016; Gu et al., 2016). However, fully off-policy algorithms still attain better efficiency. A particularly popular off-policy actor-critic method, DDPG (Lillicrap et al., 2015), which is a deep variant of the deterministic policy gradient (Silver et al., 2014) algorithm, uses a Q-function estimator to enable off-policy learning, and a deterministic actor that maximizes this Q-function. As such, this method can be viewed both as a deterministic actor-critic algorithm and an approximate Q-learning algorithm. Unfortunately, the interplay between the deterministic actor network and the Q-function typically makes DDPG extremely difficult to stabilize and brittle to hyperparameter settings (Duan et al., 2016; Henderson et al., 2017). As a consequence, it is difficult to extend DDPG to complex, high-dimensional tasks, and on-policy policy gradient methods still tend to produce the best results in such settings (Gu et al., 2016). Our method instead combines off-policy actor-critic training with a stochastic actor, and further aims to maximize the entropy of this actor with an entropy maximization objective. We find that this actually results in a considerably more stable and scalable algorithm that, in practice, exceeds both the efficiency and final performance of DDPG. A similar method can be derived as a zero-step special case of stochastic value gradients (SVG(0)) (Heess et al., 2015). However, SVG(0) differs from our method in that it optimizes the standard maximum expected return objective, and it does not make use of a separate value network, which we found to make training more stable.
items.zh: 已有一些工作通过引入离策略样本和使用高阶方差缩减技术来提高样本效率，同时保持鲁棒性（O'Donoghue 等人，2016；Gu 等人，2016）。然而，完全离策略的算法仍然具有更好的效率。一种特别流行的离策略演员-评论家方法是 DDPG（Lillicrap 等人，2015），它是确定性策略梯度（Silver 等人，2014）算法的深度变体，使用 Q 函数估计器实现离策略学习，并使用确定性演员最大化该 Q 函数。因此，该方法既可以视为确定性演员-评论家算法，也可以视为近似 Q 学习算法。不幸的是，确定性演员网络和 Q 函数之间的相互作用通常使 DDPG 极难稳定，并且对超参数设置非常敏感（Duan 等人，2016；Henderson 等人，2017）。因此，DDPG 难以扩展到复杂的高维任务，而在这些设置中，在策略策略梯度方法仍然倾向于产生最佳结果（Gu 等人，2016）。我们的方法反而将离策略演员-评论家训练与随机演员相结合，并进一步通过熵最大化目标来最大化该演员的熵。我们发现这实际上产生了一个更加稳定和可扩展的算法，在实践中，其效率和最终性能都超过了 DDPG。类似的方法可以作为随机价值梯度（SVG(0)）的零步特例推导出来（Heess 等人，2015）。然而，SVG(0) 与我们的方法不同，它优化了标准的最大期望回报目标，并且没有使用单独的价值网络，而我们发现这使训练更加稳定。

items.en: Maximum entropy reinforcement learning optimizes policies to maximize both the expected return and the expected entropy of the policy. This framework has been used in many contexts, from inverse reinforcement learning (Ziebart et al., 2008) to optimal control (Todorov, 2008; Toussaint, 2009; Rawlik et al., 2012). In guided policy search (Levine & Koltun, 2013; Levine et al., 2016), the maximum entropy distribution is used to guide policy learning towards high-reward regions. More recently, several papers have noted the connection between Q-learning and policy gradient methods in the framework of maximum entropy learning (O’Donoghue et al., 2016; Haarnoja et al., 2017; Nachum et al., 2017a; Schulman et al., 2017a). While most of the prior model-free works assume a discrete action space, Nachum et al. (2017b) approximate the maximum entropy distribution with a Gaussian and Haarnoja et al. (2017) with a sampling network trained to draw samples from the optimal policy. Although the soft Q-learning algorithm proposed by Haarnoja et al. (2017) has a value function and actor network, it is not a true actor-critic algorithm: the Q-function is estimating the optimal Q-function, and the actor does not directly affect the Q-function except through the data distribution. Hence, Haarnoja et al. (2017) motivates the actor network as an approximate sampler, rather than the actor in an actor-critic algorithm. Crucially, the convergence of this method hinges on how well this sampler approximates the true posterior. In contrast, we prove that our method converges to the optimal policy from a given policy class, regardless of the policy parameterization. Furthermore, these prior maximum entropy methods generally do not exceed the performance of state-of-the-art off-policy algorithms, such as DDPG, when learning from scratch, though they may have other benefits, such as improved exploration and ease of fine-tuning. In our experiments, we demonstrate that our soft actor-critic algorithm does in fact exceed the performance of prior state-of-the-art off-policy deep RL methods by a wide margin.
items.zh: 最大熵强化学习优化策略以最大化期望回报和策略的期望熵。该框架已在许多背景下使用，从逆强化学习（Ziebart 等人，2008）到最优控制（Todorov，2008；Toussaint，2009；Rawlik 等人，2012）。在引导策略搜索中（Levine & Koltun，2013；Levine 等人，2016），最大熵分布用于引导策略学习朝向高奖励区域。最近，一些论文注意到了 Q 学习和策略梯度方法在最大熵学习框架中的联系（O'Donoghue 等人，2016；Haarnoja 等人，2017；Nachum 等人，2017a；Schulman 等人，2017a）。虽然大多数先前的无模型工作假设离散动作空间，但 Nachum 等人（2017b）用高斯分布近似最大熵分布，Haarnoja 等人（2017）用训练用于从最优策略中抽取样本的采样网络近似。尽管 Haarnoja 等人（2017）提出的软 Q 学习算法具有价值函数和演员网络，但它不是真正的演员-评论家算法：Q 函数估计的是最优 Q 函数，而演员除了通过数据分布外，并不直接影响 Q 函数。因此，Haarnoja 等人（2017）将演员网络视为近似采样器，而不是演员-评论家算法中的演员。关键是，该方法的收敛性取决于该采样器对真实后验的近似程度。相比之下，我们证明了我们的方法从给定的策略类收敛到最优策略，无论策略参数化如何。此外，这些先前的最大熵方法通常不会在从头学习时超过最先进的离策略算法（如 DDPG）的性能，尽管它们可能有其他好处，例如改进的探索和易于微调。在我们的实验中，我们证明了我们的软演员-评论家算法确实以较大优势超过了先前最先进的离策略深度强化学习方法的性能。

items.en: We first introduce notation and summarize the standard and maximum entropy reinforcement learning frameworks.
items.zh: 我们首先介绍符号表示，并总结标准和最大熵强化学习框架。

We will use ρπ​(𝐬t)subscript𝜌𝜋subscript𝐬𝑡\rho_{\pi}({\mathbf{s}_{t}}) and ρπ​(𝐬t,𝐚t)subscript𝜌𝜋subscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡\rho_{\pi}({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}}) to denote the state and state-action marginals of the trajectory distribution induced by a policy π​(𝐚t|𝐬t)𝜋conditionalsubscript𝐚𝑡subscript𝐬𝑡\pi({\mathbf{a}_{t}}|{\mathbf{s}_{t}}).
items.zh: 我们研究连续动作空间中的策略学习问题。考虑一个无限时域马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），由元组 (𝒮,𝒜,p,r) 定义，其中状态空间 𝒮 和动作空间 𝒜 是连续的，未知的状态转移概率 p: 𝒮×𝒮×𝒜→[0,∞) 表示给定当前状态 𝐬t∈𝒮 和动作 𝐚t∈𝒜 时下一状态 𝐬t+1∈𝒮 的概率密度。环境在每次转移时发出有界奖励 r: 𝒮×𝒜→[rmin,rmax]。我们将使用 ρπ(𝐬t) 和 ρπ(𝐬t,𝐚t) 分别表示由策略 π(𝐚t|𝐬t) 诱导的轨迹分布的状态边际和状态-动作边际。

items.en: Standard RL maximizes the expected sum of rewards ∑t𝔼(𝐬t,𝐚t)∼ρπ⁡[r​(𝐬t,𝐚t)]subscript𝑡subscript𝔼similar-tosubscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡subscript𝜌𝜋𝑟subscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡\sum_{t}\operatorname{\mathbb{E}}_{({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}})\sim\rho_{\pi}}\left[r({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}})\right]. We will consider a more general maximum entropy objective (see e.g. Ziebart (2010)), which favors stochastic policies by augmenting the objective with the expected entropy of the policy over ρπ​(𝐬t)subscript𝜌𝜋subscript𝐬𝑡\rho_{\pi}({\mathbf{s}_{t}}):
items.zh: 标准RL最大化期望奖励总和 ∑t𝔼(𝐬t,𝐚t)∼ρπ[r(𝐬t,𝐚t)]。我们将考虑一个更一般的最大熵目标（参见例如 Ziebart (2010)），该目标通过在目标中添加策略在 ρπ(𝐬t) 上的期望熵来偏好随机策略：

items.en: The temperature parameter α𝛼\alpha determines the relative importance of the entropy term against the reward, and thus controls the stochasticity of the optimal policy. The maximum entropy objective differs from the standard maximum expected reward objective used in conventional reinforcement learning, though the conventional objective can be recovered in the limit as α→0→𝛼0\alpha\rightarrow 0. For the rest of this paper, we will omit writing the temperature explicitly, as it can always be subsumed into the reward by scaling it by α−1superscript𝛼1\alpha^{-1}.
items.zh: 温度参数 α 决定了熵项相对于奖励的重要性，从而控制最优策略的随机性。最大熵目标不同于传统强化学习中使用的标准最大期望奖励目标，尽管当 α→0 时，传统目标可以恢复。在本文的其余部分，我们将省略显式写出温度，因为它总是可以通过将奖励乘以 α^{-1} 来纳入其中。

items.en: This objective has a number of conceptual and practical advantages. First, the policy is incentivized to explore more widely, while giving up on clearly unpromising avenues. Second, the policy can capture multiple modes of near-optimal behavior. In problem settings where multiple actions seem equally attractive, the policy will commit equal probability mass to those actions. Lastly, prior work has observed improved exploration with this objective (Haarnoja et al., 2017; Schulman et al., 2017a), and in our experiments, we observe that it considerably improves learning speed over state-of-art methods that optimize the conventional RL objective function. We can extend the objective to infinite horizon problems by introducing a discount factor γ𝛾\gamma to ensure that the sum of expected rewards and entropies is finite. Writing down the maximum entropy objective for the infinite horizon discounted case is more involved (Thomas, 2014) and is deferred to Appendix A.
items.zh: 该目标具有若干概念和实践上的优势。首先，策略被激励进行更广泛的探索，同时放弃明显无希望的途径。其次，策略可以捕获近最优行为的多个模式。在多个动作看起来同样有吸引力的问题设置中，策略将向这些动作分配相等的概率质量。最后，先前的工作观察到使用该目标可以改善探索（Haarnoja et al., 2017; Schulman et al., 2017a），并且在我们的实验中，我们观察到它比优化传统RL目标函数的最先进方法显著提高了学习速度。我们可以通过引入折扣因子 γ 来确保期望奖励和熵的总和有限，从而将该目标扩展到无限视界问题。为无限视界折扣情况写出最大熵目标更为复杂（Thomas, 2014），并推迟到附录A。

items.en: Prior methods have proposed directly solving for the optimal Q-function, from which the optimal policy can be recovered (Ziebart et al., 2008; Fox et al., 2016; Haarnoja et al., 2017). We will discuss how we can devise a soft actor-critic algorithm through a policy iteration formulation, where we instead evaluate the Q-function of the current policy and update the policy through an off-policy gradient update. Though such algorithms have previously been proposed for conventional reinforcement learning, our method is, to our knowledge, the first off-policy actor-critic method in the maximum entropy reinforcement learning framework.
items.zh: 先前的方法提出直接求解最优Q函数，从中可以恢复最优策略（Ziebart et al., 2008; Fox et al., 2016; Haarnoja et al., 2017）。我们将讨论如何通过策略迭代公式设计一个软演员-评论家算法，其中我们评估当前策略的Q函数并通过离策略梯度更新来更新策略。尽管此类算法先前已针对传统强化学习提出，但据我们所知，我们的方法是最大熵强化学习框架中的第一个离策略演员-评论家方法。

full.sec: 4 From Soft Policy Iteration to Soft Actor-Critic
full.secZh: 4 从软策略迭代到软演员-评论家

items.en: Our off-policy soft actor-critic algorithm can be derived starting from a maximum entropy variant of the policy iteration method. We will first present this derivation, verify that the corresponding algorithm converges to the optimal policy from its density class, and then present a practical deep reinforcement learning algorithm based on this theory.
items.zh: 我们的离策略软演员-评论家算法可以从策略迭代方法的最大熵变体推导出来。我们将首先介绍这一推导，验证相应算法从其密度类收敛到最优策略，然后基于该理论提出一种实用的深度强化学习算法。

items.en: We will begin by deriving soft policy iteration, a general algorithm for learning optimal maximum entropy policies that alternates between policy evaluation and policy improvement in the maximum entropy framework. Our derivation is based on a tabular setting, to enable theoretical analysis and convergence guarantees, and we extend this method into the general continuous setting in the next section. We will show that soft policy iteration converges to the optimal policy within a set of policies which might correspond, for instance, to a set of parameterized densities.
items.zh: 我们将从推导软策略迭代开始，这是一种在最大熵框架下交替进行策略评估和策略改进的学习最优最大熵策略的通用算法。我们的推导基于表格设置，以便进行理论分析和收敛性保证，并在下一节中将该方法扩展到一般的连续设置。我们将证明软策略迭代收敛到一组策略中的最优策略，这组策略可能对应于参数化密度族。

While in principle we could choose any projection, it will turn out to be convenient to use the information projection defined in terms of the Kullback-Leibler divergence. items.en: The full soft policy iteration algorithm alternates between the soft policy evaluation and the soft policy improvement steps, and it will provably converge to the optimal maximum entropy policy among the policies in ΠΠ\Pi (Theorem 1). Although this algorithm will provably find the optimal solution, we can perform it in its exact form only in the tabular case. Therefore, we will next approximate the algorithm for continuous domains, where we need to rely on a function approximator to represent the Q-values, and running the two steps until convergence would be computationally too expensive. The approximation gives rise to a new practical algorithm, called soft actor-critic.
items.zh: 完整的软策略迭代算法在软策略评估和软策略改进步骤之间交替进行，并且可以证明收敛到Π中策略中的最优最大熵策略（定理1）。尽管该算法可以证明找到最优解，但我们只能在表格情况下以其精确形式执行它。因此，接下来我们将近似该算法以用于连续域，其中我们需要依赖函数逼近器来表示Q值，并且运行两个步骤直到收敛在计算上过于昂贵。这种近似产生了一种新的实用算法，称为软演员-评论家。

items.en: Repeated application of soft policy evaluation and soft policy improvement from any π∈Π𝜋Π\pi\in\Pi converges to a policy π∗superscript𝜋\pi^{*} such that Qπ∗​(𝐬t,𝐚t)≥Qπ​(𝐬t,𝐚t)superscript𝑄superscript𝜋subscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡superscript𝑄𝜋subscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡Q^{\pi^{*}}({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}})\geq Q^{\pi}({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}}) for all π∈Π𝜋Π\pi\in\Pi and (𝐬t,𝐚t)∈𝒮×𝒜subscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡𝒮𝒜({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}})\in\mathcal{S}\times\mathcal{A}, assuming |𝒜|<∞𝒜|\mathcal{A}|<\infty.

items.en: As discussed above, large continuous domains require us to derive a practical approximation to soft policy iteration. To that end, we will use function approximators for both the Q-function and the policy, and instead of running evaluation and improvement to convergence, alternate between optimizing both networks with stochastic gradient descent. We will consider a parameterized state value function Vψ​(𝐬t)subscript𝑉𝜓subscript𝐬𝑡V_{\psi}({\mathbf{s}_{t}}), soft Q-function Qθ​(𝐬t,𝐚t)subscript𝑄𝜃subscript𝐬𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡Q_{\theta}({\mathbf{s}_{t}},{\mathbf{a}_{t}}), and a tractable policy πϕ​(𝐚t|𝐬t)subscript𝜋italic-ϕconditionalsubscript𝐚𝑡subscript𝐬𝑡\pi_{\phi}({\mathbf{a}_{t}}|{\mathbf{s}_{t}}). The parameters of these networks are ψ,θ𝜓𝜃{\psi},\ \theta, and ϕitalic-ϕ{\phi}. For example, the value functions can be modeled as expressive neural networks, and the policy as a Gaussian with mean and covariance given by neural networks. We will next derive update rules for these parameter vectors.
items.zh: 如上所述，大规模连续域要求我们推导出软策略迭代的实用近似。为此，我们将对Q函数和策略都使用函数逼近器，并且不将评估和改进运行至收敛，而是通过随机梯度下降交替优化两个网络。我们将考虑参数化的状态值函数Vψ(𝐬t)、软Q函数Qθ(𝐬t,𝐚t)以及一个易处理的策略πϕ(𝐚t|𝐬t)。这些网络的参数分别为ψ、θ和ϕ。例如，值函数可以建模为表达性强的神经网络，策略可以建模为均值和协方差由神经网络给出的高斯分布。接下来我们将推导这些参数向量的更新规则。

There is no need in principle to include a separate function approximator for the state value, since it is related to the Q-function and policy according to Equation 3. This quantity can be estimated from a single action sample from the current policy without introducing a bias, but in practice, including a separate function approximator for the soft value can stabilize training and is convenient to train simultaneously with the other networks. Alternatively, we can update the target weights to match the current value function weights periodically (see Appendix E). Finally, the policy parameters can be learned by directly minimizing the expected KL-divergence in Equation 4:
items.zh: 该更新使用目标值网络Vψ¯，其中ψ¯可以是值网络权重的指数移动平均，这已被证明可以稳定训练（Mnih等人，2015）。或者，我们可以定期更新目标权重以匹配当前值函数权重（见附录E）。最后，策略参数可以通过直接最小化公式4中的期望KL散度来学习。

items.en: There are several options for minimizing Jπsubscript𝐽𝜋J_{\pi}. A typical solution for policy gradient methods is to use the likelihood ratio gradient estimator (Williams, 1992), which does not require backpropagating the gradient through the policy and the target density networks. However, in our case, the target density is the Q-function, which is represented by a neural network an can be differentiated, and it is thus convenient to apply the reparameterization trick instead, resulting in a lower variance estimator. To that end, we reparameterize the policy using a neural network transformation
items.zh: 最小化Jπ有几种选择。策略梯度方法的典型解决方案是使用似然比梯度估计器（Williams，1992），它不需要通过策略和目标密度网络反向传播梯度。然而，在我们的情况下，目标密度是Q函数，它由神经网络表示且可微，因此应用重参数化技巧更方便，从而得到方差更低的估计器。为此，我们使用神经网络变换对策略进行重参数化。

items.en: where ϵtsubscriptitalic-ϵ𝑡\epsilon_{t} is an input noise vector, sampled from some fixed distribution, such as a spherical Gaussian. We can now rewrite the objective in Equation 10 as
items.zh: 其中ϵt是从某个固定分布（如球面高斯分布）采样的输入噪声向量。我们现在可以将公式10中的目标重写为。

items.en: where πϕsubscript𝜋italic-ϕ\pi_{\phi} is defined implicitly in terms of fϕsubscript𝑓italic-ϕf_{\phi}, and we have noted that the partition function is independent of ϕitalic-ϕ{\phi} and can thus be omitted. We can approximate the gradient of Equation 12 with
items.zh: 其中πϕ由fϕ隐式定义，并且我们注意到配分函数与ϕ无关，因此可以省略。我们可以用下式近似公式12的梯度。

items.en: where 𝐚tsubscript𝐚𝑡{\mathbf{a}_{t}} is evaluated at fϕ​(ϵt;𝐬t)subscript𝑓italic-ϕsubscriptitalic-ϵ𝑡subscript𝐬𝑡f_{\phi}(\epsilon_{t};{\mathbf{s}_{t}}). This unbiased gradient estimator extends the DDPG style policy gradients (Lillicrap et al., 2015) to any tractable stochastic policy.
items.zh: 其中𝐚t在fϕ(ϵt;𝐬t)处求值。这个无偏梯度估计器将DDPG风格的策略梯度（Lillicrap等人，2015）扩展到任何易处理的随机策略。

items.en: Our algorithm also makes use of two Q-functions to mitigate positive bias in the policy improvement step that is known to degrade performance of value based methods (Hasselt, 2010; Fujimoto et al., 2018). In particular, we parameterize two Q-functions, with parameters θisubscript𝜃𝑖\theta_{i}, and train them independently to optimize JQ​(θi)subscript𝐽𝑄subscript𝜃𝑖J_{Q}(\theta_{i}). We then use the minimum of the Q-functions for the value gradient in Equation 6 and policy gradient in Equation 13, as proposed by Fujimoto et al. (2018). Although our algorithm can learn challenging tasks, including a 21-dimensional Humanoid, using just a single Q-function, we found two Q-functions significantly speed up training, especially on harder tasks. The complete algorithm is described in Algorithm 1. The method alternates between collecting experience from the environment with the current policy and updating the function approximators using the stochastic gradients from batches sampled from a replay buffer. In practice, we take a single environment step followed by one or several gradient steps (see Appendix D for all hyperparameter). Using off-policy data from a replay buffer is feasible because both value estimators and the policy can be trained entirely on off-policy data. The algorithm is agnostic to the parameterization of the policy, as long as it can be evaluated for any arbitrary state-action tuple.
items.zh: 我们的算法还使用两个Q函数来缓解策略改进步骤中的正偏差，这种偏差已知会降低基于值的方法的性能（Hasselt，2010；Fujimoto等人，2018）。具体来说，我们参数化两个Q函数，参数为θi，并独立训练它们以优化JQ(θi)。然后，我们使用Q函数的最小值用于公式6中的值梯度和公式13中的策略梯度，如Fujimoto等人（2018）所提出的。尽管我们的算法仅使用单个Q函数就能学习具有挑战性的任务（包括21维的Humanoid），但我们发现两个Q函数显著加快了训练速度，尤其是在更困难的任务上。完整算法在算法1中描述。该方法交替进行使用当前策略从环境中收集经验和使用从回放缓冲区采样的批次的随机梯度更新函数逼近器。在实践中，我们执行一个环境步骤，然后执行一个或多个梯度步骤（所有超参数见附录D）。使用来自回放缓冲区的离策略数据是可行的，因为值估计器和策略都可以完全在离策略数据上训练。该算法对策略的参数化形式不可知，只要它能够对任意状态-动作元组进行评估。

items.en: The goal of our experimental evaluation is to understand how the sample complexity and stability of our method compares with prior off-policy and on-policy deep reinforcement learning algorithms. We compare our method to prior techniques on a range of challenging continuous control tasks from the OpenAI gym benchmark suite (Brockman et al., 2016) and also on the rllab implementation of the Humanoid task (Duan et al., 2016). Although the easier tasks can be solved by a wide range of different algorithms, the more complex benchmarks, such as the 21-dimensional Humanoid (rllab), are exceptionally difficult to solve with off-policy algorithms (Duan et al., 2016). The stability of the algorithm also plays a large role in performance: easier tasks make it more practical to tune hyperparameters to achieve good results, while the already narrow basins of effective hyperparameters become prohibitively small for the more sensitive algorithms on the hardest benchmarks, leading to poor performance (Gu et al., 2016).
items.zh: 我们实验评估的目标是理解我们的方法在样本复杂度和稳定性方面与先前离策略和在线策略深度强化学习算法的比较。我们将我们的方法与先前技术在一系列来自OpenAI gym基准套件（Brockman等人，2016）的具有挑战性的连续控制任务以及rllab实现的Humanoid任务（Duan等人，2016）上进行比较。尽管较简单的任务可以通过多种不同算法解决，但更复杂的基准，如21维Humanoid（rllab），使用离策略算法（Duan等人，2016）异常难以解决。算法的稳定性也在性能中扮演重要角色：较简单的任务使得调整超参数以获得良好结果更加实际，而对于最困难基准上更敏感的算法，有效超参数本就狭窄的盆地变得过于狭小，导致性能不佳（Gu等人，2016）。

items.en: We compare our method to deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) (Lillicrap et al., 2015), an algorithm that is regarded as one of the more efficient off-policy deep RL methods (Duan et al., 2016); proximal policy optimization (PPO) (Schulman et al., 2017b), a stable and effective on-policy policy gradient algorithm; and soft Q-learning (SQL) (Haarnoja et al., 2017), a recent off-policy algorithm for learning maximum entropy policies. Our SQL implementation also includes two Q-functions, which we found to improve its performance in most environments. We additionally compare to twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient algorithm (TD3) (Fujimoto et al., 2018), using the author-provided implementation. This is an extension to DDPG, proposed concurrently to our method, that first applied the double Q-learning trick to continuous control along with other improvements. We have included trust region path consistency learning (Trust-PCL) (Nachum et al., 2017b) and two other variants of SAC in Appendix E. We turned off the exploration noise for evaluation for DDPG and PPO. For maximum entropy algorithms, which do not explicitly inject exploration noise, we either evaluated with the exploration noise (SQL) or use the mean action (SAC). The source code of our SAC implementation111github.com/haarnoja/sac and videos222sites.google.com/view/soft-actor-critic are available online.
items.zh: 我们将我们的方法与深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）（Lillicrap等人，2015）进行比较，该算法被认为是更高效的离策略深度强化学习方法之一（Duan等人，2016）；近端策略优化（PPO）（Schulman等人，2017b），一种稳定且有效的在线策略梯度算法；以及软Q学习（SQL）（Haarnoja等人，2017），一种用于学习最大熵策略的近期离策略算法。我们的SQL实现还包括两个Q函数，我们发现这能在大多数环境中提升其性能。我们还与双延迟深度确定性策略梯度算法（TD3）（Fujimoto等人，2018）进行比较，使用作者提供的实现。这是对DDPG的扩展，与我们的方法同时提出，首次将双Q学习技巧应用于连续控制并进行了其他改进。我们在附录E中包含了信任区域路径一致性学习（Trust-PCL）（Nachum等人，2017b）以及SAC的另外两个变体。对于DDPG和PPO，我们在评估时关闭了探索噪声。对于不显式注入探索噪声的最大熵算法，我们要么使用探索噪声进行评估（SQL），要么使用平均动作（SAC）。我们的SAC实现的源代码111github.com/haarnoja/sac和视频222sites.google.com/view/soft-actor-critic可在线获取。

items.en: The results show that, overall, SAC performs comparably to the baseline methods on the easier tasks and outperforms them on the harder tasks with a large margin, both in terms of learning speed and the final performance. For example, DDPG fails to make any progress on Ant-v1, Humanoid-v1, and Humanoid (rllab), a result that is corroborated by prior work (Gu et al., 2016; Duan et al., 2016). SAC also learns considerably faster than PPO as a consequence of the large batch sizes PPO needs to learn stably on more high-dimensional and complex tasks. Another maximum entropy RL algorithm, SQL, can also learn all tasks, but it is slower than SAC and has worse asymptotic performance. The quantitative results attained by SAC in our experiments also compare very favorably to results reported by other methods in prior work (Duan et al., 2016; Gu et al., 2016; Henderson et al., 2017), indicating that both the sample efficiency and final performance of SAC on these benchmark tasks exceeds the state of the art. All hyperparameters used in this experiment for SAC are listed in Appendix D.
items.zh: 结果表明，总体而言，SAC 在较简单的任务上表现与基线方法相当，而在较困难的任务上，无论是在学习速度还是最终性能方面，都大幅优于它们。例如，DDPG 在 Ant-v1、Humanoid-v1 和 Humanoid (rllab) 上未能取得任何进展，这一结果得到了先前工作的证实（Gu et al., 2016; Duan et al., 2016）。SAC 的学习速度也明显快于 PPO，这是因为 PPO 在更高维度和更复杂的任务上需要较大的批次大小才能稳定学习。另一种最大熵强化学习算法 SQL 也能学习所有任务，但速度比 SAC 慢，且渐近性能更差。在我们的实验中，SAC 所取得的定量结果也与先前工作中其他方法报告的结果（Duan et al., 2016; Gu et al., 2016; Henderson et al., 2017）相比非常有利，表明 SAC 在这些基准任务上的样本效率和最终性能均超越了当前最优水平。本实验中 SAC 使用的所有超参数列于附录 D。

items.en: The results in the previous section suggest that algorithms based on the maximum entropy principle can outperform conventional RL methods on challenging tasks such as the humanoid tasks. In this section, we further examine which particular components of SAC are important for good performance. We also examine how sensitive SAC is to some of the most important hyperparameters, namely reward scaling and target value update smoothing constant.
items.zh: 上一节的结果表明，基于最大熵原理的算法在诸如人形机器人等具有挑战性的任务上可以优于传统的强化学习方法。在本节中，我们进一步考察SAC的哪些特定组件对良好性能至关重要。我们还考察了SAC对某些最重要的超参数（即奖励缩放和目标值更新平滑常数）的敏感程度。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Comparison of SAC (blue) and a deterministic variant of SAC (red) in terms of the stability of individual random seeds on the Humanoid (rllab) benchmark. The comparison indicates that stochasticity can stabilize training as the variability between the seeds becomes much higher with a deterministic policy.
items.capZh: 图2：在Humanoid (rllab)基准上，SAC（蓝色）与SAC的确定性变体（红色）在单个随机种子稳定性方面的比较。比较表明，随机性可以稳定训练，因为使用确定性策略时，种子之间的变异性显著增大。

items.en: Soft actor-critic learns stochastic policies via a maximum entropy objective. The entropy appears in both the policy and value function. In the policy, it prevents premature convergence of the policy variance (Equation 10). In the value function, it encourages exploration by increasing the value of regions of state space that lead to high-entropy behavior (Equation 5). To compare how the stochasticity of the policy and entropy maximization affects the performance, we compare to a deterministic variant of SAC that does not maximize the entropy and that closely resembles DDPG, with the exception of having two Q-functions, using hard target updates, not having a separate target actor, and using fixed rather than learned exploration noise. Figure 2 compares five individual runs with both variants, initialized with different random seeds. Soft actor-critic performs much more consistently, while the deterministic variant exhibits very high variability across seeds, indicating substantially worse stability. As evident from the figure, learning a stochastic policy with entropy maximization can drastically stabilize training. This becomes especially important with harder tasks, where tuning hyperparameters is challenging. In this comparison, we updated the target value network weights with hard updates, by periodically overwriting the target network parameters to match the current value network (see Appendix E for a comparison of average performance on all benchmark tasks).
items.zh: 软演员-评论家通过最大熵目标学习随机策略。熵出现在策略和价值函数中。在策略中，它防止策略方差的过早收敛（公式10）。在价值函数中，它通过增加导致高熵行为的状态空间区域的价值来鼓励探索（公式5）。为了比较策略的随机性和熵最大化对性能的影响，我们将SAC与一个不最大化熵的确定性变体进行比较，该变体与DDPG非常相似，不同之处在于它有两个Q函数，使用硬目标更新，没有单独的目标演员，并使用固定的而非学习的探索噪声。图2比较了两种变体的五次独立运行，每次使用不同的随机种子初始化。软演员-评论家的表现更加一致，而确定性变体在不同种子之间表现出非常高的变异性，表明稳定性明显较差。从图中可以看出，通过熵最大化学习随机策略可以极大地稳定训练。这在任务更困难、超参数调优具有挑战性时变得尤为重要。在此比较中，我们使用硬更新来更新目标价值网络权重，即定期用当前价值网络参数覆盖目标网络参数（所有基准任务的平均性能比较见附录E）。

items.en: Since SAC converges to stochastic policies, it is often beneficial to make the final policy deterministic at the end for best performance. For evaluation, we approximate the maximum a posteriori action by choosing the mean of the policy distribution. Figure 3(a) compares training returns to evaluation returns obtained with this strategy indicating that deterministic evaluation can yield better performance. It should be noted that all of the training curves depict the sum of rewards, which is different from the objective optimized by SAC and other maximum entropy RL algorithms, including SQL and Trust-PCL, which maximize also the entropy of the policy.
items.zh: 由于SAC收敛到随机策略，为了获得最佳性能，通常在最终使策略变为确定性是有益的。在评估时，我们通过选择策略分布的均值来近似最大后验动作。图3(a)比较了训练回报与使用此策略获得的评估回报，表明确定性评估可以产生更好的性能。需要注意的是，所有训练曲线都描绘了奖励总和，这与SAC和其他最大熵强化学习算法（包括SQL和Trust-PCL）优化的目标不同，后者还最大化策略的熵。

items.en: Soft actor-critic is particularly sensitive to the scaling of the reward signal, because it serves the role of the temperature of the energy-based optimal policy and thus controls its stochasticity. Larger reward magnitudes correspond to lower entries. Figure 3(b) shows how learning performance changes when the reward scale is varied: For small reward magnitudes, the policy becomes nearly uniform, and consequently fails to exploit the reward signal, resulting in substantial degradation of performance. For large reward magnitudes, the model learns quickly at first, but the policy then becomes nearly deterministic, leading to poor local minima due to lack of adequate exploration. With the right reward scaling, the model balances exploration and exploitation, leading to faster learning and better asymptotic performance. In practice, we found reward scale to be the only hyperparameter that requires tuning, and its natural interpretation as the inverse of the temperature in the maximum entropy framework provides good intuition for how to adjust this parameter.
items.zh: 软演员-评论家对奖励信号的缩放特别敏感，因为它充当基于能量的最优策略的温度角色，从而控制其随机性。较大的奖励幅度对应较低的温度。图3(b)显示了当奖励尺度变化时学习性能如何变化：对于小的奖励幅度，策略变得几乎均匀，因此未能利用奖励信号，导致性能大幅下降。对于大的奖励幅度，模型最初学习很快，但随后策略变得几乎确定性，由于缺乏充分的探索而导致较差的局部最优。在正确的奖励缩放下，模型平衡了探索和利用，导致更快的学习和更好的渐近性能。在实践中，我们发现奖励尺度是唯一需要调优的超参数，并且它在最大熵框架中作为温度的倒数的自然解释为如何调整该参数提供了良好的直觉。

items.en: It is common to use a separate target value network that slowly tracks the actual value function to improve stability. We use an exponentially moving average, with a smoothing constant τ𝜏\tau, to update the target value network weights as common in the prior work (Lillicrap et al., 2015; Mnih et al., 2015). A value of one corresponds to a hard update where the weights are copied directly at every iteration and zero to not updating the target at all. In Figure 3(c), we compare the performance of SAC when τ𝜏\tau varies. Large τ𝜏\tau can lead to instabilities while small τ𝜏\tau can make training slower. However, we found the range of suitable values of τ𝜏\tau to be relatively wide and we used the same value (0.005) across all of the tasks. In Figure 4 (Appendix E) we also compare to another variant of SAC, where instead of using exponentially moving average, we copy over the current network weights directly into the target network every 1000 gradient steps. We found this variant to benefit from taking more than one gradient step between the environment steps, which can improve performance but also increases the computational cost.
items.zh: 通常使用一个单独的目标价值网络，它缓慢跟踪实际价值函数以提高稳定性。我们使用指数移动平均，平滑常数τ，来更新目标价值网络权重，这与先前的工作常见（Lillicrap等人，2015；Mnih等人，2015）。值为1对应于硬更新，即每次迭代直接复制权重，值为0则根本不更新目标。在图3(c)中，我们比较了τ变化时SAC的性能。大的τ可能导致不稳定，而小的τ可能使训练变慢。然而，我们发现τ的合适值范围相对较宽，并且我们在所有任务中使用了相同的值（0.005）。在图4（附录E）中，我们还比较了SAC的另一种变体，其中不是使用指数移动平均，而是每1000个梯度步直接将当前网络权重复制到目标网络。我们发现这种变体受益于在环境步之间采取多个梯度步，这可以提高性能，但也增加了计算成本。

items.en: We present soft actor-critic (SAC), an off-policy maximum entropy deep reinforcement learning algorithm that provides sample-efficient learning while retaining the benefits of entropy maximization and stability. Our theoretical results derive soft policy iteration, which we show to converge to the optimal policy. From this result, we can formulate a soft actor-critic algorithm, and we empirically show that it outperforms state-of-the-art model-free deep RL methods, including the off-policy DDPG algorithm and the on-policy PPO algorithm. In fact, the sample efficiency of this approach actually exceeds that of DDPG by a substantial margin. Our results suggest that stochastic, entropy maximizing reinforcement learning algorithms can provide a promising avenue for improved robustness and stability, and further exploration of maximum entropy methods, including methods that incorporate second order information (e.g., trust regions (Schulman et al., 2015)) or more expressive policy classes is an exciting avenue for future work.
items.zh: 我们提出了软演员-评论家（SAC），一种离策略最大熵深度强化学习算法，它在保持熵最大化和稳定性优势的同时，提供了样本高效的 learning。我们的理论结果推导了软策略迭代，并证明其收敛到最优策略。基于这一结果，我们能够制定软演员-评论家算法，并通过实验表明，它优于最先进的无模型深度强化学习方法，包括离策略的 DDPG 算法和在策略的 PPO 算法。事实上，该方法的样本效率显著超过了 DDPG。我们的结果表明，随机、熵最大化的强化学习算法可以为提高鲁棒性和稳定性提供有前景的途径，进一步探索最大熵方法，包括结合二阶信息（例如，信任区域（Schulman 等人，2015））或更具表达力的策略类别，是未来工作的一个令人兴奋的方向。

items.zh: 我们感谢Vitchyr Pong的深刻讨论以及在实现算法和提供DDPG基线代码方面的帮助；感谢Ofir Nachum在运行Trust-PCL实验时提供的支持；感谢George Tucker对本文早期版本提出的宝贵反馈。本研究得到了西门子和Berkeley DeepDrive的支持。
